name: Cockpit
description: API-first, self-hosted, modular headless content platform built on PHP with flexible content modeling

description.value: API-first, self-hosted, modular headless content platform built on PHP with flexible content modeling

repository.comment: New v2 repository; legacy v1 at github.com/agentejo/cockpit (5.4k stars)

initial-release.comment: Conceived in 2011 by Agentejo, first public release in October 2013

github-stars.comment: New v2 repository; legacy v1 repository (agentejo/cockpit) has 5.4k stars

cms-type.comment: API-first headless CMS; content delivered via REST and GraphQL

deployment-model.comment: Self-hosted only; no official managed service

database-support.comment: SQLite for lightweight projects; MongoDB for scalability

api-type.comment: Both REST and GraphQL APIs available with real-time capabilities

multi-tenancy.comment: Spaces feature allows managing multiple sites from single installation

static-site-generation.comment: Works as content source for static site generators; JAMstack compatible

content-types.comment: Collections (multiple entries), Singletons (single entry), and Trees (hierarchical)

custom-fields.comment: 18+ built-in field types with support for custom field addons

field-types.comment: Text, Wysiwyg, Asset, Content Link, Object (JSON), Set (component), Layout, Navigation, plus Code, Color, Date, Number, Select, SEO, Time

content-relationships.comment: Content Link and Collection Page Item field types for referencing other content

nested-components.comment: Set of Fields for grouping; Layout field for component-based content (Pro addon)

localization.comment: Built-in multi-language support; Lokalize Pro addon for enhanced translation management

content-validation.comment: Conditional fields and validation rules supported

embedded-interactives.comment: No built-in interactive widget embedding; content is delivered via API

content-versioning.comment: Revisions feature allows reverting to previous content states

draft-publish.comment: Content preview functionality for draft states

scheduled-publishing.comment: Available via Autopilot Pro addon for automation

content-locking.comment: No built-in content locking feature documented

audit-logging.comment: No built-in audit logging feature documented

media-library.comment: Built-in asset management with nestable folder organization

image-transformations.comment: Image API for thumbnail generation and main color extraction

external-media-storage.comment: CloudStorage Pro addon for external storage integration

video-support.comment: Asset management includes video thumbnails support

svg-support.comment: Asset manager supports various file types including SVG

granular-permissions.comment: Fine-grain permissions for multiple user roles

sso-saml.comment: No SSO/SAML integration documented; two-factor authentication available

team-collaboration.comment: No built-in commenting or assignment features documented

audience-restrictions.comment: API authentication with access tokens for content restrictions

typescript-sdk.comment: Community JavaScript SDK (cockpit-sdk) exists but not TypeScript-first; last updated 7 years ago for v1

content-type-sdk.comment: Content models defined in admin UI; no code-first approach documented

cli-tools.comment: CLI commands available for management tasks

local-development.comment: Self-hosted by design; runs locally with PHP and SQLite

webhooks.comment: Webhooks Pro addon for event-triggered actions with custom payloads

plugin-system.comment: Addon system for extending functionality; custom field types supported

admin-ui-customization.comment: Custom addons can extend the admin interface

documentation-quality.comment: Adequate documentation with guides for Next.js, Nuxt, Laravel; API reference available but could be more comprehensive

frontend-frameworks.comment: Official integration guides for Next.js, Nuxt.js, Remix, and Laravel

search-integration.comment: Detektivo Pro addon provides full-text search with custom indexing

ecommerce-integration.comment: Can be integrated with e-commerce APIs; Snipcart tutorial available

ai-features.comment: Autopilot Pro addon provides AI-driven content generation and image creation

response-caching.comment: No built-in API response caching documented

global-regions.comment: Self-hosted; deploy in any region but no managed multi-region

free-tier.comment: Core is open source and free forever

pricing-model.comment: Core is free; Pro addons €299/project (first year updates included, €99/year thereafter); 50% discount for non-profits/education

commercial-support.comment: Enterprise tier available for custom licensing and high-level support

enterprise-features.comment: Enterprise licensing available for specific requirements and consulting
